languages.text: Бескрайние исполинские корни тянутся сколько хватает взора. Что-то движется в их глубине. Или это сами растения?
Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?
languages.original_text: Бескрайние исполинские корни тянутся сколько хватает взора. Что-то движется в их глубине. Или это сами растения?

traits.locale_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl across the horizon. Something is moving deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?
Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl across the horizon. Something is moving deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?
Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?
Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

languages.text: 无穷无尽的巨大根系一直蔓延至地平线尽头。有东西在它们深处活动。又或者，动的是植物本身？
languages.original_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

traits.locale_text: 无穷无尽的巨大根系一直蔓延至地平线尽头。有东西在它们深处活动。又或者，动的是植物本身？

languages.text: Uçsuz bucaksız, devasa kökler ufka kadar uzanıyor. Derinliklerinde bir şey hareket ediyor. Bitkilerin kendisi mi yoksa?
languages.original_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

traits.locale_text: Uçsuz bucaksız, devasa kökler ufka kadar uzanıyor. Derinliklerinde bir şey hareket ediyor. Bitkilerin kendisi mi yoksa?

languages.text: Des racines gigantesques s'étendent jusqu'à l'horizon. On voit du mouvement dans les profondeurs de leur enchevêtrement. Seraient-ce les plantes elles-mêmes qui bougent ?
languages.original_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

traits.locale_text: Des racines gigantesques s'étendent jusqu'à l'horizon. On voit du mouvement dans les profondeurs de leur enchevêtrement. Seraient-ce les plantes elles-mêmes qui bougent ?

languages.text: Unas raíces interminables y gigantescas se extienden hasta el horizonte. Algo se mueve en sus profundidades... ¿o son las propias plantas?
languages.original_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

traits.locale_text: Unas raíces interminables y gigantescas se extienden hasta el horizonte. Algo se mueve en sus profundidades... ¿o son las propias plantas?

languages.text: Riesige Wurzeln erstrecken sich endlos bis zum Horizont. Irgendetwas regt sich in ihren Tiefen. Oder sind das die Pflanzen selbst?
languages.original_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

traits.locale_text: Riesige Wurzeln erstrecken sich endlos bis zum Horizont. Irgendetwas regt sich in ihren Tiefen. Oder sind das die Pflanzen selbst?

languages.text: 果てしなく、途方もなく巨大な根が、地平線の彼方まで広がっている。その奥深くで、何かが動いている。それとも、植物そのものなのだろうか？
languages.original_text: Endless, gargantuan roots sprawl all the way to the horizon. Something moves deep within them. Or could it be the plants themselves?

traits.locale_text: 果てしなく、途方もなく巨大な根が、地平線の彼方まで広がっている。その奥深くで、何かが動いている。それとも、植物そのものなのだろうか？
